title: Tutorial Worlds Legacy Console Edition
description: Adds a “Tutorial Worlds” button with a built-in browser for Legacy Console Edition tutorial worlds.
body:
# 🌍 Tutorial Worlds Legacy Console Edition

Relive the nostalgia of Minecraft Legacy Console Edition directly inside Java Edition!

**Tutorial Worlds Legacy Console Edition** is a client-side Minecraft mod by **Team SmartStreamLabs** that adds a fully integrated **Tutorial Worlds Browser** to the Minecraft main menu, allowing players to browse, explore, and create playable copies of classic Legacy Console Edition tutorial worlds.

Whether you want to revisit the iconic tutorial maps from Xbox 360, PlayStation 3, Wii U, Xbox One, or PlayStation 4, this mod provides an easy and polished way to experience these worlds again in modern Minecraft.

![New main menu button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f90dc3e47c548ebc9d858ef5ee8387ee3d94de85.jpeg)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

## ✨ Features

### 🏠 Built-In Tutorial Worlds Browser

A new **"Tutorial Worlds"** button is added directly to the Minecraft main menu beneath Multiplayer, maintaining a clean vanilla-style layout.

The browser includes:

* Large preview screenshots
* World descriptions
* Legacy Console Edition version information
* Platform information
* Release year
* Update number (TU)
* World size information
* Additional metadata for each tutorial world

The interface is inspired by the original Legacy Console Edition world selection screens for an authentic nostalgic experience.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

### 📚 Included Tutorial Worlds

The mod currently includes multiple classic tutorial worlds, including:

* Pre-TU1
* TU1
* TU3
* TU5
* TU7
* TU9
* TU12
* TU14
* TU19
* TU31
* TU46
* TU69

Each world contains its own preview image and detailed information.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

### ⚠️ First-Time Disclaimer Screen

Before accessing the Tutorial Worlds Browser for the first time, players are presented with a disclaimer explaining ownership and project information.

Players must accept the disclaimer before continuing.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

### 🌎 One-Click World Creation

Creating a tutorial world is simple:

1. Open the Tutorial Worlds Browser.
2. Select a tutorial world.
3. Click **Create World**.

The mod automatically:

* Extracts the selected world archive
* Creates a unique save folder
* Prevents overwriting existing worlds
* Places the world into your Minecraft saves folder
* Launches the newly created world automatically

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

### 🛡️ Safe World Handling

Tutorial Worlds Legacy Console Edition includes multiple safety systems:

* Never modifies the original world archives
* Never overwrites existing worlds
* Handles missing files safely
* Logs loading and copy errors
* Supports development archives from `.minecraft/tutorial_worlds/`
* Includes compatibility and migration logic for older tutorial world formats

Migration support includes:

* Legacy world data updates
* Legacy dimension folder fixes
* Old item stack conversion
* Chunk preparation
* Entity data preparation
* Point-of-interest data preparation

This helps older tutorial worlds load more reliably in modern Minecraft versions.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

## 📦 Client-Side Only

This mod is completely client-side.

✔ No server installation required
✔ No multiplayer features
✔ No new blocks or items
✔ No gameplay changes
✔ No commands or progression systems

The sole purpose of this mod is to provide a polished browser for Legacy Console Edition tutorial worlds and allow players to create playable singleplayer copies.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

## ❤️ Made for Nostalgia & Preservation

Tutorial Worlds Legacy Console Edition was created to help preserve and celebrate the iconic tutorial worlds that introduced millions of players to Minecraft.

Whether you're revisiting childhood memories or exploring these maps for the first time, this mod makes the experience simple and accessible within modern Java Edition.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

## Disclaimer

This project is an unofficial fan-made mod.

Minecraft®, Mojang®, Microsoft®, and the original Legacy Console Edition tutorial world maps are the property of Mojang Studios and Microsoft.

This mod is not affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or approved by Mojang Studios or Microsoft.

The mod code created by Team SmartStreamLabs is released into the Public Domain.

The included tutorial world maps and their associated assets remain the property of Mojang Studios and Microsoft.
